articles.title: Price analysis 4/19: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, ADA, DOGE, MATIC, SOL, DOT, LTC
articles.description: Bitcoin and select altcoins turned down sharply on April 19, but a minor positive is that the bulls are trying to defend their respective support levels.

articles.title: FTX US’s Former President To Launch A Trading Platform For Crypto And Futures
articles.description: Brett Harrison, the former president of FTX US, is launching a new trading venture to offer crypto and futures trading to institutional investors.
